title: Skyblock Challenge +
description:
Spawn on a skyblock, and get as many advancements as you can to expand the worldborder. The game is beatable!
Great for playing with friends!
body:
# **Skyblock Challenge +**
Dive into the world of skyblock, but with a _twist_!
The worldborder is set to 10, and to expand the border, get as many advancements as you can!
There are over 1000 advancements, so the world can get pretty big.
Some advancements will give you a reward for completing them.

The modpack also adds automated:

 💎 [Mining](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mining-quarries)
 
 🌳 [Foraging](https://modrinth.com/datapack/potted-farms)
 
 🌽 [Farming](https://modrinth.com/datapack/auto-harvest)

 So you don't have to waste all your time mining cobblestone.

 There are other islands in the sky with other biomes on them and there are structures.
 To make sure you can obtain almost every block, extra mechanics have been added.

## **The Game Is Beatable!**
The end portal will spawn alowing you to go to the end and fight the enderdragon.
However, it will be a hard and long journy, so playing this with your friends will be even more exciting!

If you want to play with others [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc) is recommended

## **Warning**
- Make sure to use the datapacks in the datapackfolder. (they load automatically)
- When Starting go to >menu >mods >advancement border and change the settings.

- (Change the Increase from Tasks/Goals/Challenges)

### **Recommended settings:**
- Increase from Tasks > 2
- Increase from Goals > 5
- Increase from Challenges > 10

  Increasing it will make the game easier.
  
# **List of Mods:**

- [Advancement Border](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancement-border) The worldborder will grow when completing advancements.
- [Advancements Search](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancementssearch) make it easier to find advancements.
- [Always Infect Villagers](https://modrinth.com/mod/always-infect-villagers) Your villager will get a second chance to be cured when killed.
- [Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) Monitor your saturation.
- [Auto Harvest](https://modrinth.com/datapack/auto-harvest) Make automatic crop farms.
- [Better Mob Drop (No Advancements)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/better_mob_drop-nav) Improves some mob drops.
- [Cooperative Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/cooperative-advancements) Everyone shares advancements so no one has to do it again.
- [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) look further and find more islands in the sky.
- [Mining Quarries](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mining-quarries) Automatically mines cobblestone **and ores** for you.
- [Potted Farms](https://modrinth.com/datapack/potted-farms) No need for chopping wood and planting trees anymore.
- [No Free Deaths: Better keepinventory](https://modrinth.com/datapack/no-free-deaths) Keep your stuff but make it more fair to fall down.
- [Skyblock Standard](https://modrinth.com/datapack/standard-skyblock) To play skyblock you need a Skyblock (Duh)
- [Skyblock Sand Island](https://modrinth.com/datapack/skyblock-sand-island) For more resources.
- [Skyblock Biome Islands](https://modrinth.com/datapack/skyblock-biome-islands) Find more trees and other blocks in the sky!


## **DataPacks**

- [BlazeandCave's Advancements Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blazeandcaves-advancements-pack) Adds 1000+ advancements
- [Void Worldgen](https://modrinth.com/datapack/skyblock-void-worldgen) Adds structures to the world.
- Border Setup
  

## **Other mods with less impact on gameplay:**
- [Model gap fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)
- [More Proffesions](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-professions)
- [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)
- [Wandering Trader Revamp](https://modrinth.com/datapack/revamped-wandering-trader)
- [Settling Trader](https://modrinth.com/mod/settling-trader)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Unlimited Trading](https://modrinth.com/datapack/unlimited-trading)
- [Visible Traders](https://modrinth.com/mod/visible-traders)

## **Resourcepacks**

- [Dramatic Skys](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dramatic-skys)
- [Simple Grass Flowers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-grass-flowers)

# **Special Thanks** 
Thank you [Specerijen](https://modrinth.com/user/Specerijen) for Making the "Border Setup" datapack

# **Changelog**
(dd-mm-yy)

2-4-2025: Uploaded modpack

15-4-2025: Added "Border setup" datapack and added 7 gallery photo's
